title: Escape from Enies Lobby: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: After all, your stupid attack won't...

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: Ugh....!! Come back to normal, body!! hurry!!!

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: Hurry!! Or I'll be done for!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Isn't there anything I can do!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: OR EVERYONE WILL DROWN TO DEATH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I CAN'T HOLD MY BREATH ANYMORE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aah, am I dreaming or something ......!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A few drowned sailors in the ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If this is a dream, please...
